task_description: Integrate github.com/siderolabs/go-kmsg for early boot init logging. Wire slog.NewTextHandler with a kmsg.Writer as the underlying io.Writer in enter.go and init.go so all early structured logs go to the kernel ring buffer before /dev/console is available. Fall back to os.Stderr if /dev/kmsg cannot be opened. Transition to console writer after ConsoleRedirect succeeds.

verification.summary: go build ./... passes. All tests pass with race detector. golangci-lint reports 0 issues. internal/klog coverage at 94.1%. Tests exercise real code paths via pipe-based kmsg simulation and would fail if implementation were reverted.
